task_completion.description: Verify the agent imported the CSV survey dataset.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A dialog box showing the import of 'colorado_survey_coded.csv' or survey points appearing in the main CAD drawing area.

task_completion.description: Verify the 'V-TREE' layer was created and assigned the color Green (index 3).
task_completion.visual_evidence: Layer properties manager or layer list showing a new layer named 'V-TREE' with a green color indicator.

task_completion.description: Verify the 'V-FENCE' layer was created and assigned the color Yellow (index 2).
task_completion.visual_evidence: Layer properties manager or layer list showing a new layer named 'V-FENCE' with a yellow color indicator.

task_completion.description: Verify the 'V-ROAD' layer was created and assigned the color Red (index 1).
task_completion.visual_evidence: Layer properties manager or layer list showing a new layer named 'V-ROAD' with a red color indicator.

task_completion.description: Verify points with codes TREE, FENCE, and ROAD are moved to their respective layers.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Points in the drawing area changing color to match their new layers (green, yellow, red), or a properties panel showing selected points being assigned to 'V-TREE', 'V-FENCE', or 'V-ROAD'.

task_completion.description: Verify the drawing is exported as a DXF file to the specified path.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A 'Save As' or 'Export' dialog box showing the file name 'layered_delivery.dxf' being saved in the 'C:\Users\Docker\Documents\' folder.

integrity.description: Ensure the agent used the CAD software's graphical interface to create layers and move points.
integrity.visual_evidence: Clicks on layer managers, properties panels, and point selection in the CAD software, rather than running a Python script or terminal command to edit the DXF directly.

integrity.description: Ensure the agent used the software's export/save functionality.
integrity.visual_evidence: The presence of the software's native 'Save As' or 'Export' dialog, rather than just renaming a file in the file explorer.

integrity.description: Ensure the agent did not just open a text editor to write a DXF file manually.
integrity.visual_evidence: Absence of Notepad, VS Code, or other text editors being used to write DXF formatting or CSV data directly.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Input file: C:\Users\Docker\Documents\colorado_survey_coded.csv. Expected output: C:\Users\Docker\Documents\layered_delivery.dxf. Required layers and colors: 'V-TREE' (Color index 3 / Green), 'V-FENCE' (Color index 2 / Yellow), 'V-ROAD' (Color index 1 / Red).
